title: pouzolzia pentandra subsp. wightii
intro: Pouzolzia pentandra subsp. wightii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the nettle family, Urticaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouzolzia pentandra subsp. wightii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pouzolzia pentandra subsp. wightii is typically used in herbal preparations like decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are often made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to extract its medicinal properties.
